name: Ham Dinner Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. To freeze: Place dinner slices in a freezer bag; mark and store in the freezer.
2. To prepare: Thaw completely before heating.
1. Heat in a 350-degree oven until warm (about 20 minutes).
2. Alternatively, heat spread out on a serving platter for 1 to 3 minutes on HIGH in the microwave.
Serving Ideas: Baked Potatoes, Artichokes, Pineapple Upside-Down Cake
